project.name: LibMgnt
project.status: Librarian Command Center V2 + Event-Driven Notification System + Bento Dashboard

database_schema.summary: Database quan hệ PostgreSQL quản lý: Người dùng, Danh mục, Sách, Phiếu mượn và Phí phạt. Hỗ trợ thông báo JSON-metadata.
database_schema.relationships_explained: 1 User có nhiều Notification. Notification lưu metadata (JSON) để render thông tin linh hoạt trên FE.

api_endpoints.explained: GET: fetch notifications for current user. POST: send notification (internal/admin). PATCH: mark as read.
Login: receives email/password, returns user info + JWT token
Process book returns, calculate fines, and trigger RETURN_SUCCESS notifications.

business_rules: Metadata-driven Notifications: Favor structured events over hardcoded strings for better scalability
Overdue Checker: Automated daily scanning at 08:00 AM via cron jobs
Notification Polling: UI polls every 60s (temporarily 5s for dev) to keep states synced
Strict DRY principle, no logic duplication
Compute-on-read Overdue Pattern for real-time accurate state
Fine Calculation: fine = overdueDays * 5,000 VND, persisted upon return
features: Event-Driven Notification System: Real-time bell alerts with metadata-driven dynamic rendering
Automated Overdue Engine: Daily reminders for borrowing violations
Librarian Command Center: Actionable Bento Grid dashboard
Inventory Audit: Dead stock detection and best-seller tracking
Borrow Management: POS-style workflow with real-time validation

patterns: Metadata-driven UI Pattern: Backend sends data, Frontend renders message (Event-driven)
Command Center Pattern: Actionable-first UI design
Proxy-based Alias Strategy: Internal src/shared/ re-exports root shared/ to satisfy Vite
gotchas: Prisma JSON fields: Use explicit casting 'as any' in repositories to satisfy TypeScript when assigning JSON objects
Vite Module Resolution: Use proxy files within src/ to bridge shared code outside src/
TSC string | null: Ensure Prisma optional fields (String?) are handled with ?? null in repositories
conventions: English Localization for all UI and code comments
JSONB for flexible metadata in Notification and Audit models
